arts.ttl: ‘Only matter of time’ – Hull City closing in on signing January target
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Hull City should soon complete the transfer of Fenerbahce midfielder Lincoln. Yesterday there were reports the Championship side were looking to get a deal over the line for the 26-year-old. NTV Spor report on the latest developments regarding Hull City’s pursuit for the Brazilian, and they say The post ‘Only matter of time’ – Hull City closing in on signing January target appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Hull City star's FA Cup comments will be music to the ears of Tigers diehards
arts.sum: Abu Kamara wants to build on his man of the performance against Leeds United as Hull City prepare to face Doncaster Rovers in the FA Cup third round. The Tigers battled back from 3-1 down to draw 3-3 in a pulsating Yorkshire derby with the Whites, with Kamara scoring a brace with one coming after five minutes, and his second in the 90th to snatch a point.

arts.ttl: Hull City handed double boost for FA Cup clash with Grant McCann's Doncaster Rovers
arts.sum: It was really difficult before we arrived here, so we know how much it costs for that kind of game, and we need to be at our best if we want to go to the next round." Ryan Longman could return to the Hull City squad for Sunday’s FA Cup tie with Doncaster Rovers while, as expected, goalkeeper Carl Rushworth will be involved.

arts.ttl: Preview: Hull City vs. Doncaster Rovers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's FA Cup clash between Hull City and Doncaster Rovers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Dean Windass: Ex-Premier League star and Hull City legend diagnosed with dementia
arts.sum: Windass’ diagnosis was revealed by former Manchester United defender David May on BBC Breakfast

arts.ttl: Matt Crooks' first words as Hull City chief explains first January transfer
arts.sum: Matt Crooks says he got to fulfil a lifelong dream of playing in the USA but is "buzzing" to be back in England after penning a deal with Hull City . The former Middlesbrough favourite became City's first signing of the January transfer window and of Ruben Selles' reign as Tigers boss when he penned a two-and-a-half-year contract at the MKM Stadium, having opted to leave MLS side Real Salt Lake after less than a year in Utah.

arts.ttl: Hull City complete first January transfer signing as ex-Middlesbrough man jets in from USA
arts.sum: City agreed a deal with the MLS club earlier this week after extensive talks with the 30-year-old which began last month, which has seen Crooks pen a two-and-a-half-year deal at the MKM Stadium and the Tigers paying an undisclosed fee. The Leeds-born midfielder was a guest of honour at his former club Middlesbrough when they beat City 3-1 at the Riverside Stadium on November 30, after returning to England with the MLS currently preparing for the new campaign, which gets underway next month.

arts.ttl: Ruben Selles issues fresh Hull City transfer update as Tigers edge closer to more signings
arts.sum: Ruben Selles says Hull City are closing in on another couple of signings which he hopes will be completed before the trek to the capital next weekend to face Millwall when the Championship resumes. "There are not going to be a couple in before the weekend," Selles told Hull Live.

arts.ttl: Hull City icon Dean Windass breaks silence after dementia diagnosis
arts.sum: Windass, who netted the iconic goal that propelled his childhood club Hull City into the Premier League during the 2008 Wembley playoff final, endorsed May's tweets by retweeting them. Former Hull City striker Dean Windass, 55, has spoken out after it was confirmed that he has been diagnosed with dementia.

arts.ttl: Hull City nearing deal for Brazilian playmaker, report claims
arts.sum: Hull City are closing in on a deal for Fenerbahce attacking midfielder Lincoln, as per a report from… The post Hull City nearing deal for Brazilian playmaker, report claims appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
